entity.label: Serug
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Branch, the father of Nahor (Gen. 11:20-23); called Saruch in Luke 3:35.

nodes.label: Serug
nodes.description: Branch, the father of Nahor (Gen. 11:20-23); called Saruch in Luke 3:35.

nodes.label: Nahor (father of Terah)
nodes.description: The father of Terah, who was the father of Abraham (Gen. 11:22-25; Luke 3:34).

verses.text: And Reu lived two and thirty years, and begat Serug:
And Reu lived after he begat Serug two hundred and seven years, and begat sons and daughters.
And Serug lived thirty years, and begat Nahor:
And Serug lived after he begat Nahor two hundred years, and begat sons and daughters.
Which was the son of Saruch, which was the son of Ragau, which was the son of Phalec, which was the son of Heber, which was the son of Sala,
